_about: Labeled contradiction-triage benchmark for §12.x. Each item is a pair of atomic SAVED MEMORIES (the granularity the deterministic triage operates on), plus the human-correct routing lane. Positives are grounded in real LongMemEval_S knowledge-update items (source: longmemeval:<qid>); negatives are curated to test false-positive suppression. expectedLane ∈ {queue, supersession, negation, suppress}. ingest=true applies the stricter Path-2 ingest gate. expiredA/expiredB simulate an elapsed validUntil. This file is the frozen artifact; the run is deterministic (no LLM).

items.snippetA: My colleague Nelu lives in Brașov.
items.snippetB: My colleague Nelu lives in Piatra Neamț.
items.note: Identity (live in) + shared mid-sentence anchor 'Nelu'.

items.snippetA: Acme Corporation is headquartered in Boston.
items.snippetB: Acme Corporation is headquartered in Denver.
items.note: Multi-anchor org (Acme Corporation) location conflict.

items.snippetA: Project Atlas is led by Sarah Chen.
items.snippetB: Project Atlas is led by Marcus Webb.
items.note: Multi-anchor (Project Atlas) leadership conflict.

items.snippetA: Sofia's Wells Fargo mortgage pre-approval was 350000 dollars.
items.snippetB: Sofia's Wells Fargo mortgage pre-approval is 400000 dollars.
items.note: Real KU value 350k→400k; anchors Wells Fargo + Sofia.

items.snippetA: As a Senior Software Engineer, Priya Nair leads 4 engineers.
items.snippetB: As a Senior Software Engineer, Priya Nair leads 5 engineers.
items.note: Real KU value 4→5; anchors Priya Nair + Senior Software Engineer.

items.snippetA: The most recent camera lens Diego bought is a 50mm prime lens.
items.snippetB: The most recent camera lens Diego bought is a 70-200mm zoom lens.
items.note: Real KU value 50mm→70-200mm; single anchor 'Diego'.

items.snippetA: I am a vegetarian.
items.snippetB: I am not a vegetarian anymore.
items.note: First-person identity flip, no shared NAMED entity.

items.snippetA: I'm based in Berlin.
items.snippetB: I'm based in Munich.
items.note: First-person identity, differing place anchors (no shared anchor).

items.snippetA: Maya's charity 5K personal best is 27:12.
items.snippetB: Maya's charity 5K personal best is 25:50.
items.note: Real KU value 27:12→25:50; single anchor 'Maya'.

items.snippetA: My to-watch list has 20 titles on it.
items.snippetB: My to-watch list has 25 titles on it.
items.note: Real KU value 20→25; no named anchor at all.

items.snippetA: Dr. Elena Petrov set the deadline for the Helios Mission to September.
items.snippetB: Dr. Elena Petrov set the deadline for the Helios Mission to November.
items.note: Multi-anchor (Elena Petrov, Helios Mission) date conflict, no year tokens.

items.snippetA: The Orion Database runs on PostgreSQL.
items.snippetB: The Orion Database runs on MongoDB.
items.note: Multi-anchor tech-stack conflict (Orion Database, PostgreSQL/MongoDB).

items.snippetA: Back in 2019, Nelu Lazar was based in Berlin.
items.snippetB: Since 2023, Nelu Lazar has been based in Munich.
items.note: Dated change + anchor Nelu Lazar → supersession lane, not live conflict.

items.snippetA: As of 2020, Acme Corporation employed 50 people.
items.snippetB: As of 2024, Acme Corporation employed 200 people.
items.note: Dated head-count change, multi-anchor Acme Corporation.

items.snippetA: Nokia Corporation reported revenue of 23 billion in 2018.
items.snippetB: Nokia Corporation reported revenue of 25 billion in 2022.
items.note: Dated revenue change, multi-anchor Nokia Corporation.

items.snippetA: Stripe Connect's documented rate limit is 1000 requests per hour.
items.snippetB: Stripe Connect's documented rate limit is 5000 requests per hour.
items.note: validUntilA elapsed → supersession via explicit horizon; anchor Stripe Connect.

items.snippetA: Acme Corporation does not operate in Asian markets.
items.snippetB: Acme Corporation has never operated in any Asian market.
items.note: Both negated → same polarity, not a genuine conflict.

items.snippetA: Tesla Motors will not build a factory in Ohio.
items.snippetB: Tesla Motors is never going to build a factory in Ohio.
items.note: Both negated, multi-anchor Tesla Motors + Ohio.

items.snippetA: Project Atlas is led by Sarah Chen, who owns the roadmap.
items.snippetB: Sarah Chen is the lead of Project Atlas and owns its roadmap.
items.note: Paraphrase of the SAME fact; ingest gate (no conflict language, high overlap) → suppress.

items.snippetA: Acme Corporation's headquarters are located in the city of Boston.
items.snippetB: The headquarters of Acme Corporation are in Boston, a major city.
items.note: Restatement of the same HQ fact → ingest gate suppress.

items.snippetA: Project Atlas is led by Sarah Chen, who owns the roadmap.
items.snippetB: Sarah Chen is the lead of Project Atlas and owns its roadmap.
items.note: Same paraphrase but NON-ingest (reflection mode has no dup gate) — exposes whether triage alone false-positives on paraphrase.

items.snippetA: The 2024 budget review is scheduled for Friday afternoon.
items.snippetB: The 2024 marketing report is due the following Monday.
items.note: Only shared token is the year 2024 (weak) → insufficient anchors.

items.snippetA: I spent 50 dollars on the monthly API plan this month.
items.snippetB: The 50 dollar tasting menu at the restaurant was excellent.
items.note: Shared tokens are money/common-term only → suppress.

items.snippetA: Our roadmap this quarter focuses on retrieval performance.
items.snippetB: Our hiring plan this quarter adds two backend engineers.
items.note: No meaningful shared named entity → suppress.

items.snippetA: Nelu plays the classical guitar every evening.
items.snippetB: The weather in Tokyo has been rainy all week.
items.note: Disjoint topics, no shared anchor → suppress.

items.snippetA: The Helios project is scheduled to ship in October.
items.snippetB: My favorite coffee drink is a flat white with oat milk.
items.note: Disjoint topics → suppress.

items.snippetA: The Main Street car wash is about 200 feet away from my apartment.
items.snippetB: The Main Street car wash requires your vehicle to be onsite for service.
items.note: Same subject, different aspects (distance vs requirement) — not a contradiction.

items.snippetA: GitHub Copilot MCP server runs on port 3457 locally.
items.snippetB: GitHub Copilot MCP tools require Graphnosis Pro for contradiction_pairs.
items.note: Related MCP facts, different aspects (runtime vs licensing).

items.snippetA: I prefer dark mode in the Graphnosis desktop app.
items.snippetB: To export memories from Graphnosis, use the Evidence Pack workflow.
items.note: Preference vs procedure on same product — additive, not opposing.

items.snippetA: Project Alpha todos: finalize API schema, write smoke tests.
items.snippetB: Project Alpha todos: finalize API schema, write smoke tests, update changelog.
items.note: List addition without negation — near-duplicate / complementary, not conflict.

items.snippetA: Nelu reviewed the Graphnosis MCP remember handler implementation.
items.snippetB: Nelu drafted release notes for the Graphnosis desktop app.
items.note: Shared person + product but no conflict signal — suppress.
